inputs.name: branch_input
inputs.desc: Collected branch slices laid out as contiguous [slice][row][feature] blocks

constraints.notes: Concatenates main rows with collected fixed-width branch slices along the feature axis.

notes: Generic feature-axis concat for fixed branch collections.
